sections.paragraph:
σύν [= older ξύν, no discernible outside influence or connection] prep. w. dat. serving to indicate association or connection with

—a. w. focus on association with Lk 2:13; 7:12; J 21:3; Ac 4:13; 10:23; Phil 1:23; οἱ σύν τινι (sc. ὄντες) those with someone Mk 2:26; Lk 5:9; Ac 5:17; ἡ χάρις τ. ϑεου σὺν ἐμοί the grace of God that attended me 1 Cor 15:10.

—b. w. focus on addition of a pers. or thing with, along with Mt 25:27; Lk 5:19; 1 Cor 10:13; Eph 3:18; Js 1:11. Freq. the additive sense can be rendered including, as well as Lk 20:1; Ac 3:4; 10:2; 14:5; 23:15; Gal 5:24; Eph 4:31; Phil 1:1. σύν πᾶσιν τούτοις besides/not only all this Lk 24:21.
